ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: RecordType.DeveloperName = "Wolves" && ISPICKVAL(StageName , "Live") && OR(ISPICKVAL(Wolves_IO__c, ""), ISPICKVAL(Wolves_IO__c, "Not Signed")) && NOT($Profile.Id='00eb0000000oBvcAAE')
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Field IO can't be blank or "Not Signed" if the stage of the opportunity is Live.
